name: quail-ultra-live
description: Account-backed web fork of Quail Ultra with study-pack import, export, offline cache, and sync.

scripts.check: node --check server/index.js && node --check shared/progress.js && node --check shared/qbank.js && node --check web/js/lib/live-api.js && node --check web/js/lib/live-compat.js && node --check web/js/pages/index.js && node --check web/js/pages/overview.js && node --check web/js/pages/newblock.js && node --check web/js/pages/previousblocks.js && node --check web/js/pages/examview.js && node --check web/js/pages/loadbank.js

author: Ahmad Hajji
